result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text - text
LINE 3:        AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate))) A...
                                                  ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: SELECT ownerid AS agent_id,
       COUNT(DISTINCT id) AS total_cases_handled,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate))) AS avg_handle_time_seconds
FROM "Case"
WHERE createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
  AND createddate < DATE '2023-09-03'
  AND closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND id IN (
      SELECT caseid__c
      FROM casehistory__c
      WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
      GROUP BY caseid__c
      HAVING COUNT(*) = 1
  )
GROUP BY ownerid
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT id) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
SELECT ownerid AS agent_id,
       COUNT(DISTINCT id) AS total_cases_handled,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate))) AS avg_handle_time_seconds
FROM "Case"
WHERE createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
  AND createddate < DATE '2023-09-03'
  AND closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND id IN (
      SELECT caseid__c
      FROM casehistory__c
      WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
      GROUP BY caseid__c
      HAVING COUNT(*) = 1
  )
GROUP BY ownerid
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT id) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT ownerid AS agent_id,
       COUNT(DISTINCT id) AS total_cases_handled,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate))) AS avg_handle_time_seconds
FROM "Case"
WHERE createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
  AND createddate < DATE '2023-09-03'
  AND closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND id IN (
      SELECT caseid__c
      FROM casehistory__c
      WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
      GROUP BY caseid__c
      HAVING COUNT(*) = 1
  )
GROUP BY ownerid
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT id) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT ownerid AS agent_id,
       COUNT(DISTINCT id) AS total_cases_handled,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (CAST(closeddate AS timestamp) - CAST(createddate AS timestamp)))) AS avg_handle_time_seconds
FROM "Case"
WHERE CAST(createddate AS date) >= DATE '2023-05-02'
  AND CAST(createddate AS date) < DATE '2023-09-03'
  AND closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND id IN (
      SELECT caseid__c
      FROM casehistory__c
      WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
      GROUP BY caseid__c
      HAVING COUNT(*) = 1
  )
GROUP BY ownerid
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT id) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT ownerid AS agent_id,
       COUNT(DISTINCT id) AS total_cases_handled,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (CAST(closeddate AS timestamp) - CAST(createddate AS timestamp)))) AS avg_handle_time_seconds
FROM "Case"

exec_args.sql:
SELECT ownerid AS agent_id,
       COUNT(DISTINCT id) AS total_cases_handled,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (CAST(closeddate AS timestamp) - CAST(createddate AS timestamp)))) AS avg_handle_time_seconds
FROM "Case"
WHERE CAST(createddate AS date) >= DATE '2023-05-02'
  AND CAST(createddate AS date) < DATE '2023-09-03'
  AND closeddate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY ownerid
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT id) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_seconds ASC
LIMIT 10;

result.preview: "No support agents match the specified criteria in the past four months (there are no closed cases in that period with valid handle times), so no agent Id can be returned."

args.answer: No support agents match the specified criteria in the past four months (there are no closed cases in that period with valid handle times), so no agent Id can be returned.
